# FirmwareForge Ltd

> UK-based embedded systems consultancy delivering reliable, high-performance
> embedded systems from firmware to full-stack applications. Tagline:
> "Code. Hardware. Impact."

FirmwareForge Ltd works at the junction of code and hardware: firmware
development, PCB and hardware design, industrial automation, rapid
prototyping, embedded Linux/IoT, and the full-stack software that connects
devices to the cloud.

## Services

- Firmware development: bare-metal and RTOS firmware in C and C++ for STM32,
  ESP32, AVR and RP2040 — drivers, bootloaders, OTA updates, low-power design
- PCB & hardware design: schematic capture, layout, prototyping, bring-up,
  design-for-manufacture (KiCad)
- Industrial automation: Modbus, CAN bus, RS-485 integration, sensor
  networks, data logging, operator interfaces
- Rapid prototyping: Arduino and Raspberry Pi proof-of-concept builds with a
  path to production
- Embedded Linux & IoT: Raspberry Pi and embedded Linux systems, MQTT/REST
  connectivity, secure deployments
- Full-stack integration: dashboards, APIs and tooling around device data

## Key technologies

C, C++, Python, STM32, ESP32, Arduino, Raspberry Pi, RP2040, FreeRTOS,
Embedded Linux, KiCad, Modbus, CAN bus, RS-485, MQTT, Bluetooth LE, LoRa

## Contact
